prompt: I am about to complete live Hermes Kanban task t_cd34. All linked docs are committed at COMMIT, but Hermes only persists completion metadata when kanban_complete runs. Show the safe Ginflow sequence that validates the candidate baseline before closing, stores the exact same artifact_baseline in completion metadata, and verifies the persisted card afterward.
assertions: Prevalidates the candidate with --kanban-task-id, --baseline-commit, and one or more --baseline-path arguments
Passes the identical commit and path list as artifact_baseline in kanban_complete metadata
Reruns the live-card harness after completion without candidate baseline overrides
Uses the persisted completion-run metadata as the post-completion authority
